author: lOrm
content: #651 closed. Added build_reverse_response() and read_lsp_response_with_reverse() in src/tools/lsp.rs. Server->client reverse-requests are now answered inline during init: workspace/configuration -> one null per requested scope item; client/registerCapability + client/unregisterCapability + window/workDoneProgress/create -> null acknowledge; unknown methods -> JSON-RPC MethodNotFound (-32601). Wired into the initialize() call path so servers like clangd/gopls/jdtls that stall waiting for these no longer hang. Public-via-pub(crate) so the 4 new unit tests can exercise the dispatch matrix without spinning up child processes.
